description_long: This is a detached suburban house with a red gable roof and beige exterior walls, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The front facade features a central entryway with a small porch, flanked by two windows and a garage on the right side. The roof includes dormer windows, adding architectural interest and likely providing natural light to the upper level. The property is bordered by hedges and a paved driveway leading to the garage. The rear and side views show a continuation of the green landscaping and additional windows, with the back of the house being simpler and windowless. The overall design is compact, symmetrical, and typical of North American residential neighborhoods.
description: A beige suburban house with a red gable roof, dormer windows, a front porch, garage, and lush landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, two front windows, garage, and driveway, framed by trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain wall with no windows or doors, surrounded by trees and hedges, and a visible driveway edge.
description_view_2: Opposite front view highlighting the entryway, porch, and two large trees partially obscuring the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back wall, dormer windows on the roof, and dense landscaping on both sides.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, steps, and flanking windows, accented by simple landscaping and a paved path.
